type.description: Hook event type, such as l0-router, l1-process, file-write, git-write, utf8-doc, script-guard, or l3-closeout.

llm_model.description: Current LLM model identifier. Required for mode=light-dev model-boundary checks.

task_shape.description: Light-dev boundary facts such as changed_files_count, modules_count, implementation_steps_count, and formal trigger flags.

task_package_path.description: Active docs/work/D* task package path for formal task modes.

accepted_design_path.description: Accepted Design path required before formal Todo or implementation work.

active_todo.description: Current Todo path or id required for formal implementation modes.

document_preflight.description: Governed Markdown persistence preflight. Requires brainstorming_invoked=true and no_open_user_questions=true or equivalent confirmation.

ui_ux_pro_max.description: Method-skill evidence for Web page design. Android UI/UX design is exempt.
